string-array.name: alisa_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Move. Backdash, SSL, duck, etc.
Keep-out tools are quite good.

string-array.name: alisa_des_notes
string-array.item: SWL beats most of this stance.
Needs to use high or low to continue pressure.

string-array.name: anna_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Bait FF2 with movements, and whiff punish.
Keepout can be very effective.

string-array.name: armor_king_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Move a lot. SSR and backdash.
If SS2 hits, you can SSL and avoid followups if spaced well.

string-array.name: asuka_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Try not to duck a lot, prefer lateral movement and backdash. Once they start using their lows, mix in keepout tools.

string-array.name: azucena_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Always challenge WR3,2 with down-jab.

string-array.name: bryan_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SWL after B1 or Hatchet will avoid most followups.
At the wall, don\'t tech roll. Better to side roll.

string-array.name: claudio_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Move a lot in neutral to counteract WR2

string-array.name: clive_phx_notes
string-array.item: After B2, jab or down-jab. Jab beats PC, down-jab beats low.

string-array.name: devil_jin_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SSR into duck at range to avoid electric and hellsweep.

string-array.name: dragunov_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After B4,2 you can press buttons. Once they start pressing the high, duck and launch.

string-array.name: fahkumram_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SSR a LOT. This helps avoid jet kick.

string-array.name: feng_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After DF1, a down-jab will beat all common options. Once they start to side step, utilize a fast CH button.

string-array.name: heihachi_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SSR after df1 as a layer 0.

string-array.name: hwoarang_neutral_notes
string-array.item: In either Flamingo stance, down-jab whenever you think he is plus.

string-array.name: jack_8_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Always low parry his lows.

string-array.name: jin_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SSR a lot in open neutral to force CD1 etc.

string-array.name: jun_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Interrupt after FC.df2 (low slap) with down-jab.

string-array.name: jun_izu_notes
string-array.item: SSR-Duck all options except IZU.2 and IZU.B1+2
IZU.2 is -13 and can be SWL
IZU.B1+2 is -9 and is i16 homing

string-array.name: kazuya_neutral_notes
string-array.item: When you get knocked down, stay down and side roll.

string-array.name: king_neutral_notes
string-array.item: When they use muscle armor, run up and throw them.

string-array.name: lars_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After low-X into stance, down-jab to counteract mix. Once they start to use WS4 there, start stepping.
Prefer low-parry over block low.

string-array.name: law_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After B1,2 SWL and launch.

string-array.name: lee_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Utilize jabs for keepout. Once they adjust, start trying to get a read on move times and launch.

string-array.name: leo_neutral_notes
string-array.item: SSR UF2,1 (second hit). Once they start stance cancelling, use PC.

string-array.name: leo_knk_notes
string-array.item: Raises foot into air, normally enters at +9
Leftward movement beats a lot of options here.

string-array.name: leroy_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After blocking the safe low, throw them.

string-array.name: lidia_hrs_notes
string-array.item: After FF2, SSR-Duck beats every option except HRS.3
After FF2, Down Jab covers the same, Jab beats HRS.3
After H.FF2, utilize armor or parries.

string-array.name: lili_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Dance with her. She is very linear.
Hold back on using plus frames when she\'s at low health.

string-array.name: miary_bao_notes
string-array.item: You can jab check her whenever she enters this stance. Can be character dependent.
If jab doesn\'t work try other fast highs.
If they start using BAO.1 you can duck or SS

string-array.name: nina_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Backdash a lot instead of stepping.
df1 tracks weak side.
df1,2 follow-ups weak to SSR.

string-array.name: paul_neutral_notes
string-array.item: KBD or Hayashida to create space and avoid getting mixed.

string-array.name: raven_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After golden clones, sidestep, as they tend to down-jab.

string-array.name: reina_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After FF2, down-jab as a layer 1. Once they start beating down-jab, SSR

string-array.name: reina_sen_notes
string-array.item: After FF2, Jab challenge is best.
SEN.3 and SEN.3+4 beat jab but can be ducked and launched.

string-array.name: shaheen_snk_notes
string-array.item: Down-jab is fairly good vs most transitions.

string-array.name: steve_neutral_notes
string-array.item: Duck a lot. Steve players hate that. After they switch to mids start stepping.

string-array.name: victor_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After WR2 or WR1+2, contest with a jab. If they use options that beat jab, SSL.

string-array.name: xiaoyu_bt_notes
string-array.item: Duck throw on reaction. Do nothing if throw doesn\'t come out.

string-array.name: yoshimitsu_neutral_notes
string-array.item: After FF4, punish with a jab or 12f mid.

string-array.name: zafina_trt_notes
string-array.item: After WR1+2 into stance, down-jab or LP.

string-array.name: eddy_hsp_notes
string-array.item: After WR3, PC or jab. If he does HSP.4, SSR afterward.
